Layout.meta-description: Ricardo is a full stack web developer

AboutSection.title: About Me
AboutSection.description:
After graduating with a degree in Industrial Engineering, I gained experience by working as a manager in several companies. However, several years later, I decided to pursue my passion for coding. I enrolled in programming courses and became proficient in full-stack web development. My favorite aspect of programming is problem-solving, and I absolutely love the satisfaction of finding solutions to complex challenges.

My core stack includes React, Next.js, Node.js, Typescript, and Python. I am also familiar with Ruby on Rails and Angular. I am constantly seeking opportunities to learn and adapt to new technologies. Currently, I am actively searching for a full-time position as a software developer.

When I'm not immersed in coding, I enjoy spending quality time with my family, participating in road and mountain biking activities with the local cycling club, and going jogging. Additionally, I find joy in continuously expanding my knowledge and performing maintenance on my bikes.

ProjectData.description-La Furia AI: A chatbot, video generator, image generator, and music generator, that uses OpenAI API and Replicate. It has a free tier with limited messages, and a pid one with Stripe as payment processor for the subscription.
ProjectData.description-Short Term Rentals: A web app for short-term rental properties, like AirBnB. It features user auth with next-auth, adding properties, maps with leaflet, reservation calendar, modals ui, filtering, and more.
ProjectData.description-Soluciones iO: A web development company that helps small business to build their websites using React, Next.JS, WordPress, and WooCommerce.

ExperienceSection.title: My Experience
ExperienceSection.description-0: Over the past several months, I have been dedicated to expanding my programming skills and have focused my efforts on mastering React, Next.js and other related technologies. During this time, I have diligently honed my abilities by creating numerous small demonstration projects, each serving as a testament to my growing proficiency in React's intricacies. Additionally, I had the privilege of being hired to spearhead the development of a comprehensive invoicing system using Ruby on Rails. This project not only highlighted my technical capabilities, but also demonstrated my ability to deliver practical solutions. These experiences have solidified my commitment to advancing my expertise in web development and delivering impactful software solutions.
ExperienceSection.description-1: I was responsible for ensuring the proper operation and optimization of processes, primarily focusing on the operations department. My role also involved negotiating and collaborating with international suppliers to secure the best prices, guarantees, and conditions, thereby enhancing our competitiveness. Additionally, I took charge of developing and maintaining the company's website. To boost sales and expand our customer base, I implemented digital marketing strategies, leveraging SEO and Google Ads to reach a broader audience.
ExperienceSection.description-2: In December 1997, I earned my Bachelor of Science degree in Industrial Engineering from the University of Florida, located in the city of Gainesville, Florida, USA. This educational milestone not only equipped me with a strong foundation in industrial engineering principles but also marked the beginning of my journey towards becoming a skilled and knowledgeable professional.

Footer.about-description: built with React & Next.js (App Router & Server Actions), Next-Intl (i18n), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, React Email & Resend, Vercel hosting
